overview: Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology (SVIST), Tiruvuru, provides engineering, management, and diploma programs with structured placement support and regional industry collaborations.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹35,000 – ₹51,400 per year depending on branch and fee structure.

placements.companiesVisited: Tech Mahindra, HCL, Infosys, Vee Technologies, Sutherland, Genpact

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through Andhra Pradesh counseling and institutional quota admissions.
admissions.importantDates: Follows APSCHE academic and counseling schedules.

campus.area: Integrated technical education campus in Tiruvuru
campus.specialNote: Hostel & Mess fee ranges from ₹45,000 – ₹55,000 annually.

contact.address: Nadim Tiruvuru, Beside Ganesh Temple, By pass Road,TIRUVURU – 521 235, Krishna Dist, Andhra Pradesh, India.

hostel.note: Hostel and mess fee for standard campus living layout.

scholarships.name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD)
scholarships.description: Full annual tuition fee assistance for eligible AP-domiciled candidates.
